title: newsletter — settings
description: Newsletter platform defaults. Canonical group/section/field taxonomy. One #[AsSetting] class — `NewsletterSettings` — group key `newsletter`.

groups.label: Newsletter
groups.description: Platform defaults applied to new newsletters + reputation guardrails.

sections.label: Default newsletter behaviour
sections.description: Applied to new Newsletter rows at create time. Individual newsletters can override.

fields.name: defaults_confirmation_required
fields.label: Require double opt-in
fields.helpText: Best practice — improves deliverability + satisfies CAN-SPAM §7704(a)(5)(A)(iii).

fields.name: defaults_confirmation_ttl_hours
fields.label: Confirmation TTL (hours)
fields.helpText: Default 720 (30 days). Unconfirmed subscribers pruned past this window.

fields.name: defaults_send_batch_size
fields.label: Send batch size
fields.helpText: Recipients per send batch. Higher = faster campaigns; lower = kinder to providers.

sections.label: Reputation guardrails
sections.description: Platform-default thresholds applied to new newsletters. Auto-throttle on breach.

fields.name: reputation_min_open_rate
fields.label: Minimum open rate
fields.helpText: Alert when campaign open rate falls below this.

fields.name: reputation_max_bounce_rate
fields.label: Maximum bounce rate
fields.helpText: Auto-throttle newsletter when campaign bounce rate exceeds this.
